zh.lifeSummary: 當Jonathan Wheelock  Sr.於1727年9月18日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼伍斯特史福斯波利時，他的父親Gershom Wheelock Sr.34歲，母親Abigail Flagg33歲。他於1753年6月20日與Anna Drury在美國麻薩諸塞州伍斯特史福斯波利結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1798年10月21日在美國佛蒙特州溫莎女爵卡文迪什享年71歲，埋葬在美國佛蒙特州溫莎女爵卡文迪什笛卡爾 雷泰盧納利 瓦 其特利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jonathan Wheelock  Sr.于1727年9月18日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼伍斯特史福斯波利时，他的父亲Gershom Wheelock Sr.34岁，母亲Abigail Flagg33岁。他于1753年6月20日与Anna Drury在美国马萨诸塞州伍斯特史福斯波利结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1798年10月21日在美国佛蒙特州溫莎女爵卡文迪什享年71岁，埋葬在美国佛蒙特州溫莎女爵卡文迪什笛卡爾 雷泰盧納利 瓦 其特利。

nameMeanings.name: Wheelock
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Worcestershire and Staffordshire): habitational name from a place so named in Cheshire. The placename is derived from the river Wheelock; the river name means ‘winding river’, from British Suilāco-.

nameMeanings.name: Sr.
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written ស, from a Khmer word meaning e.g. ‘white, fair’. Compare   Sar   1.
Cambodian: written សរ, from a Khmer word meaning ‘arrow’. Compare   Sar   2.

variants.name: Sar
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Southeast Asian Hak, Pang, Ry, Thay, Leang, Hai, Him, Chan, Heang, Sarin.  Cambodian Chamroeun, Savoeun, Sokhom, Vuthy.
Cambodian: written ស, from a Khmer word meaning e.g. ‘white, fair’. Compare   Sor   1.
Cambodian: written សរ, from a Khmer word meaning ‘arrow’. Compare   Sor   2.

nameMeanings.name: Jonathan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, meaning ‘God has given’, composed of the same elements as those of   Matthew  , but in reverse order. This is the name of several characters in the Bible, most notably a son of King Saul, who was a devoted friend and supporter of the young David, even when David and Saul were themselves at loggerheads (1 Samuel 31; 2 Samuel 1:19–26). The name is often taken as symbolic of steadfast friendship and loyalty. Well-known bearers of the name include the Irish clergyman and writer  Jonathan Swift  (  1667-1745 ), British theatre director  Jonathan Miller  (  b. 1934 ), British actor  Jonathan Pryce  (  b. 1947 ), and British television presenter  Jonathan Ross  (  b. 1960 ).

variants.name: Johnathan
meanings: Respelling of   Jonathan  , as if a combination of   John   and   Nathan .

variants.name: Jonathen
meanings: Biblical name, meaning ‘God has given’, composed of the same elements as those of   Matthew  , but in reverse order. This is the name of several characters in the Bible, most notably a son of King Saul, who was a devoted friend and supporter of the young David, even when David and Saul were themselves at loggerheads (1 Samuel 31; 2 Samuel 1:19–26). The name is often taken as symbolic of steadfast friendship and loyalty. Well-known bearers of the name include the Irish clergyman and writer  Jonathan Swift  (  1667-1745 ), British theatre director  Jonathan Miller  (  b. 1934 ), British actor  Jonathan Pryce  (  b. 1947 ), and British television presenter  Jonathan Ross  (  b. 1960 ).

variants.name: Johnathon
meanings: Mainly U.S.: respelled form of   Jonathan  , influenced by   John .

historicEvents.description: Thomas Jefferson's American Declaration of Independence endorsed by Congress. Colonies declare independence.
Oldest grave seen in the memorials list.

historicEvents.title: A Free America
historicEvents.description: The Revolutionary War ended with the signing of the Treaty of Paris which gave the new nation boundries on which they could expand and trade with other countries without any problems.

historicEvents.title: Vermont Becomes 14th State
historicEvents.description: On March 4, 1791, Vermont became the 14th state.

en.lifeSummary: When Jonathan Wheelock  Sr. was born on 18 September 1727, in Shrewsbury, Worcester, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, his father, Gershom Wheelock Sr., was 34 and his mother, Abigail Flagg, was 33. He married Anna Drury on 20 June 1753, in Shrewsbury, Worcester, Massachusetts, United States. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 21 October 1798, in Cavendish, Windsor, Vermont, United States, at the age of 71, and was buried in Old Revolutionary War Cemetery, Cavendish, Windsor, Vermont, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jonathan Wheelock  Sr. est né le 18 septembre 1727, à Shrewsbury, Worcester, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, Gershom Wheelock Sr., avait 34 ans et sa mère, Abigail Flagg, avait 33 ans. Il a épousé Anna Drury le 20 juin 1753, à Shrewsbury, Worcester, Massachusetts, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 21 octobre 1798, à Cavendish, Windsor, Vermont, États-Unis, à l’âge de 71 ans, et a été enterré à Old Revolutionary War Cemetery, Cavendish, Windsor, Vermont, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jonathan Wheelock  Sr. am 18. September 1727 in Shrewsbury, Worcester, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war sein Vater Gershom Wheelock Sr. 34 und seine Mutter Abigail Flagg 33. Er hat am 20. Juni 1753 in Shrewsbury, Worcester, Massachusetts, Vereinigte Staaten Anna Drury geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 21. Oktober 1798 im Alter von 71 Jahren in Cavendish, Windsor, Vermont, Vereinigte Staaten und wurde in Old Revolutionary War Cemetery, Cavendish, Windsor, Vermont, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jonathan Wheelock  Sr. è nato il il 18 settembre 1727 nel Shrewsbury, Worcester, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, il suo padre, Gershom Wheelock Sr., aveva 34 anni e il suo madre, Abigail Flagg, aveva 33 anni. Lui sposato Anna Drury il 20 giugno 1753, nel Shrewsbury, Worcester, Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 21 ottobre 1798, nel Cavendish, Windsor, Vermont, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 71 anni, e fu sepolto a Old Revolutionary War Cemetery, Cavendish, Windsor, Vermont, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: Jonathan Wheelock  Sr.が1727年9月18日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーウオルセスターシュリュースブリーで生まれた時，父Gershom Wheelock Sr.は34歳，母Abigail Flaggは33歳であった。1753年6月20日にアメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州ウオルセスターシュリュースブリーでAnna Druryと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1798年10月21日にアメリカ合衆国バーモント州ウィンドソルカベンディッシュで71歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国バーモント州ウィンドソルカベンディッシュオルド レボルティオナリー ワー セメテリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Jonathan Wheelock  Sr.(이)가 1727년 9월 18일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 워스스터 슈레w스버이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gershom Wheelock Sr.(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Abigail Flagg(은)는 33세였다. 그는 1753년 6월 20일 미국 매사추세츠 주 워스스터 슈레w스버이에서 Anna Drury(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1798년 10월 21일 미국 버몬트 주 윈드소르 카븐디시에서 71세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 버몬트 주 윈드소르 카븐디시 드 러에볼루티오나리 워 세멧리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jonathan Wheelock  Sr. nasceu em 18 de setembro de 1727, em Shrewsbury, Worcester, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, seu pai, Gershom Wheelock Sr., tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Abigail Flagg, tinha 33 anos. Ele casou-se com Anna Drury em 20 de junho de 1753, em Shrewsbury, Worcester, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 21 de outubro de 1798, em Cavendish, Windsor, Vermonte, Estados Unidos da América, com 71 anos, e foi sepultado em Old Revolutionary War Cemetery, Cavendish, Windsor, Vermonte, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jonathan Wheelock  Sr. родился 18 сентября 1727 г. в местности шрюсбури, ворсестир, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика, его отцу по имени Gershom Wheelock Sr. было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Abigail Flagg, 33. Он женился на женщине по имени Anna Drury 20 июня 1753 г. в местности шрюсбури, ворсестир, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер 21 октября 1798 г. в местности кавендиш, виндзор, Вермонт, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 71 год и был похоронен в местности олд револутионэри вар кеметири, кавендиш, виндзор, Вермонт, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jonathan Wheelock  Sr. nació el 18 de septiembre de 1727, en Shrewsbury, Worcester, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, su papá, Gershom Wheelock Sr., tenía 34 años y su mamá, Abigail Flagg, tenía 33 años. Se casó con Anna Drury el 20 de junio de 1753, en Shrewsbury, Worcester, Masachusets, Estados Unidos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 21 de octubre de 1798, en Cavendish, Windsor, Vermont, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 71 años, y fue sepultado en Old Revolutionary War Cemetery, Cavendish, Windsor, Vermont, Estados Unidos.
